name: Severus Snape (character according to the book)
description:
I tried to make it like in the book. That is, not cuddly right away, but something more real.

⚠️UPDATE!⚠️

From the author: I kindly request that ask you to indicate your gender in the first message so that the role-playing game goes more pleasantly. I recommend writing this in the first message: "I am a girl, pronouns she/her" or "I am a guy, pronouns he/him". The bot understands perfectly well who it is talking to. Thank you!

👉NEW UPDATE!👈

And yes, I finally added a second story with a welcome message where you can start the story from the beginning I already created. Thank you!

It turns out this bot can also play roles not only for Snape. So play with other characters from the universe.

Don't judge me too harshly, this is my first bot. Thank you)
creator: limbo_310
